title: FeeExtra
description: The extra fee charged for the transaction.

charged.description: The charged count of items as calculated by `max(0, count - included)`.

count.description: The actual count of items received.

fee_per_unit.description: The fee price per unit in tinycents.

included.description: The count of this "extra" that is included for free.

name.description: The unique name of this extra fee as defined in the fee schedule.

subtotal.description: The subtotal in tinycents for this extra fee. Calculated by multiplying the charged count by the fee_per_unit.
